overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a sword-wielding character exploring a dimly lit medieval wooden cabin interior at night. The environment features warm firelight from a stone fireplace illuminating rustic wooden furniture and stone flooring as the character slowly moves through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval cabin interior with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing before the stone fireplace, observing the flames and the warm glow illuminating the room

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and an iron cauldron hanging inside
black iron cooking pot suspended over the flames
rustic wooden dining table with benches
clay pottery and jugs sitting atop the wooden table
small candle burning on a wooden stool or chest to the left

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit medieval wooden cabin, facing a stone fireplace with a burning fire. Warm orange light illuminates the stone floor and a wooden table with ceramic pottery to the right, while a single candle burns on a stool to the left. The atmosphere is quiet and intimate, with the fire providing the primary light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden storage corner with bookshelf and chest

events.description: character turns left and begins walking toward the storage area of the cabin

agents.ego_description: turning away from the fireplace and walking toward the left side of the cabin to examine the bookshelf and storage chest

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving unit with books and items stored on it
large wooden chest or trunk for storage against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks away from the fireplace toward a storage corner of the cabin. A wooden bookshelf and storage chest come into view on the left side, while the fireplace recedes from view. The candle on the stool grows closer as the character explores the darker corner of the room, with wooden beam walls surrounding the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the warm glow of a central hearth toward the shadowed recesses of a rustic cabin. It begins facing a stone fireplace where burning logs cast orange light across a stone floor and a wooden table laden with ceramic pottery. As the character turns left, the fireplace recedes into the background and the intimate light of the hearth gives way to the dimness of the room's perimeter. The scene then expands to reveal a storage corner, moving past a flickering candle on a stool toward a wooden bookshelf and a storage chest. Finally, the camera settles in the darker corner of the space, framed by heavy wooden beam walls.
